answer: I'd love to help, but none of our current tuna dishes are described as spicy [10]. I can point you to our tuna-forward options — the Toro Truffle Roll and Otoro Selection are both rich and fatty, though neither carries a spicy element [1][2].

recommendations.name: Toro Truffle Roll
recommendations.why: The Toro Truffle Roll is tuna-forward with fatty toro and earthy black truffle — the closest match to a bold, interesting tuna dish, though it is not spicy [1].

recommendations.name: Otoro Selection
recommendations.why: The Otoro Selection is the most tuna-rich, indulgent option on the menu — intensely buttery bluefin belly, though again without any spice [2].
